title: Nucleic Acid Purification with Magnetic Beads
author: Opentrons

steps.instruction: This protocol automates the purification of nucleic acids using magnetic beads. It can support up to 96 samples in multiples of 8 using the P300 Multichannel pipette. The purification process is performed using the magnetic module for the OT-2. Explanation of parameters below: - `P300 Multichannel GEN2 Mount Position`: Specify which mount (left or right) to load the P300 single channel pipette. - `Number of Samples`: Total number of samples (multiples of 8). - `Magnet Engage Height (mm)`: The height the magnet should be raised in millimeters. ---
Pause until told to resume – ‘Set the deck up as per the SOP’
Pick up tips from A1-H1 – position 7
Move to channel 1 of reagent plate in position 5
Aspirate 20ul beads in channel 1 - 3mm from bottom, mix (150ul vol, 2 times), air gap 20ul
Dispense beads into A1-H1 of sample plate on the magnetic module – 2mm above top of well, blow out to destination well
Repeat steps 3 and 4 to dispense beads in entire plate
Drop tips to waste
Pause for 5 mins - ‘5 Min incubation to allow bead binding’
Engage magnet 10mm
Pause for 3 mins - ‘3 min incubation to allow beads to move to magnet’
Pick up tips A1-H1 – position 2
Aspirate 40ul of supernatant from A1-H1 of sample plate on magnetic module – 2mm from bottom, slow speed
Dispense into the middle of waste trough in position 1 - 10mm from bottom, blow out to destination well
Eject tips back into same position of tip box in position 2
Repeat steps 11 to 14 to remove waste from the whole plate using the corresponding tips for each column
Pick up tips A2-H2 – position 7
Move to channel 3 of reagent plate in position 5
Aspirate 100ul – 3mm from bottom, air gap 20ul
Dispense to column A1-H1 of sample plate on the magnetic module – 2mm above well top, blow out to destination well
Repeat steps 18-19 to add liquid to all wells
Drop tips to waste
Pause for 30 secs - ‘Incubate for 30 seconds at RT’
Pick up tips A1-H1 – position 2
Aspirate 100ul of wash buffer from A1-H1 of sample plate on magnetic module – 2mm from bottom, slow speed
Dispense into the middle of waste trough in position 1 - 10mm from bottom, blow out to destination well
Eject tips back into same position of tip box in position 2
Repeat steps 23 to 26 to remove waste from the whole plate using the corresponding tips for each column
Pick up tips A3-H3 – position 7
Move to channel 4 of reagent plate in position 5
Repeat steps 18 to 27 so that two complete ethanol washes have been carried out
Pause for 10 mins – ‘Air dry the pellet for 10mins at RT’
Disengage the magnet
Pick up tips A4-H4 – position 7
Move to channel 5 of reagent plate in position 5
Aspirate 20ul – 3mm from bottom
Dispense into column A1-H1 of sample plate on the magnetic module – 3mm from bottom, mix 10ul vol, 5 times, blow out destination well
Drop tips to waste
Repeat steps 33 to 37 to add elution buffer to entire plate
Pause for 10 mins – ‘Incubate at RT for 10 mins to elute the sample off the beads’
Engage magnet
Pause for 2 mins- ‘Incubate at RT for 2 mins to allow beads to move to magnet’
Pick up tips A4-H4 – position 8
Aspirate 20ul from A1-H1 of sample plate on the magnetic module – 1mm from bottom
Dispense 20ul into A1-H1 of elution plate in position 3, blow out destination well
Drop tips to waste
Repeat steps 42-45 so that all sample eluate has been transferred to the elution plate
